heroSubtitle: Builder of high-performance, elegant, and user-centric web applications. Inspired by clean, robust, and meaningful design philosophies.
aboutBio: Passionate about the synergy between neat code and meticulous user interface design, I build stable, efficient systems. My methodology takes inspiration from Scandinavian simplicity and industrial execution: every line of code must deliver efficiency, and every pixel must serve a purpose.

aboutSeoTitle: About Grégoire BATCHO | Skillsets & Technical Stack
aboutSeoDesc: Explore the vision of Grégoire BATCHO: full-stack expertise across React, Tailwind, Node.js, Express, databases, and DevOps systems.
aboutBioFallback: My name is Grégoire BATCHO, a web developer deeply passionate about software design. Positioning myself between rigorous system engineering and clean design execution, j’aime édifier des applications web robustes, sûres et extrêmement rapides.
aboutBioNarrativeFallback: Drawing from a strict technical background around full-stack development, I master complex operational routines in MongoDB / PostgreSQL databases while engineering fluid user experiences in React. I strictly believe clean coding matches direct product utility to develop lasting digital tools.
aboutQuote: “An elegant user interface means nothing without a swift, secure background database infrastructure powering it.”

aboutHl2Desc: Bundle optimization, dead-code purging, and high-performance server side cache configurations.
aboutHl3Desc: Rigorous user input validation, cryptographic password hashing, and absolute API key hiding.

contactResendTip: 💡 If you configure a live Resend API key in the environment variables (.env), submitting this visual prompt automatically routes an email summary direct to my personal inbox.
contactFormSuccessDetails: ✓ Your message has been saved successfully in the database and is visible on your private admin panel.
contactResendSimulated: The Resend API key is not registered yet or remains set to the example key. The email dispatch was printed/simulated on the server console.
contactResendError: Resend API returned an error trying to dispatch this email alert.
contactResendTipOnboarding: 💡 ProTip: When using 'onboarding@resend.dev', Resend ONLY permits sending emails to the specific email address you used to register your accounts.
contactResendTipCustom: 💡 ProTip: To use custom senders, ensure the domain is fully verified under your Resend accounts panel.
